# Test OKF concept bundle (fixture)

A stand-in for a real OKF concept bundle, used only to exercise GROUND-3 anchor
resolution. It declares exactly one anchor; the ungrounded fixture's
`#does-not-exist` ref is deliberately absent, so it dangles.

## A real anchor {#real-anchor}

Prose that the `g0-resolves` norm's `grounds.ref` points into.
